birt 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with birt

Package index

All functions

algebra
Student Assessment Dataset
delta_param()
Extract the Mean Ability Estimate (delta)
discrim_params()
Extract Discrimination Estimates (a)
guessing_params()
Extract Guessing Parameter Estimates (c)
item_fit()
Item Fit Statistics (Outfit and Infit)
item_params()
Extract Item Difficulty Estimates (beta)
person_fit()
Person Fit Statistics
person_params()
Extract Student Ability Estimates (alpha + delta)
plot(<birt_fit>)
Plot a Rasch Model Fit
plot_icc()
Plot Item Characteristic Curves (ICCs)
plot_info()
Test Information Function
plot_wright_map()
Wright Map (Item-Person Map)
ppc_rasch()
Posterior Predictive Check for Rasch Model
print(<birt_fit>)
Print a Rasch Model Fit
rasch_fit()
Fit a Bayesian Rasch (1PL) IRT Model
rasch_simulate()
Simulate Data from a Rasch Model
summary(<birt_fit>)
Summarize a Rasch Model Fit
threepl_fit()
Fit a 3PL IRT Model
twopl_fit()
Fit a 2PL IRT Model
